name: Lemon Chicken Soup with Spinach and Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook for 1 minute.
2. Add celery, carrots, and red bell pepper. Cook until vegetables are tender, about 8 minutes.
3. Stir in chicken broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for about 20 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling water, then drain (Note: Cooking pasta in water rather than broth prevents it from absorbing too much homemade broth).
5. If desired, add cooked pasta to the soup after 20 minutes, cook for an additional 10 minutes, and proceed to step 3.
6. Mix in the pasta, cubed chicken, lemon juice, grated lemon peel, and spinach. Cook until spinach just wilts. Season with salt and pepper.
Makes 8 servings at 317 calories, 4 grams fat, and 3 grams fiber. Optional: Sprinkle freshly grated Parmesan cheese on top after serving; this will increase the calorie and fat content.
